hotel_name: Tru by Hilton Cái Khế (Tru by Hilton Can Tho Cai Khe)

reviews.title: Fraudulent hotel
reviews.text: I booked a room for the Lunar New Year but when I arrived at 7 PM, the hotel informed me that they hadn't cleaned the room in time and promised it would be ready in 45 minutes. However, when I returned at 11 PM, the room was still not available, and as a result, I had a sleepless night. Everyone should avoid this hotel; it's very bad.

reviews.title: Nice small hotel, kind staffs, reasonable price
reviews.positives: Nice small hotel, very friendly staffs
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Terrible hotel
reviews.text: Many years of traveling and I have never encountered a situation where check-in is at 12 PM but I only get the room at 11 PM. It's really terrible, everyone should stay away.

reviews.title: Temporary
reviews.text:
Pros: good location, rooms like in the pictures, quick and professional staff.  
Cons: dirty rooms, dirty beds and pillows, dirty furniture, everything is dirty. Breakfast is very basic with very few dishes and is not good. Overall, I won't come back.

reviews.title: Great!

Quang—the staff is great and professional.

reviews.title: The lobby staff are friendly and nice.
reviews.text: A small room is okay. Although the third floor is a lobby and there are no welcoming staff, the lobby staff is friendly and nice. However, the room staff opens the door without permission and doesn't check if the basic amenities, like shampoo, are empty. The price is cheap, but I would rather pay ten thousand won more and go to the Charmant Hotel.

reviews.title: All staffs are so friendly
reviews.positives: Good

reviews.title: good
reviews.text: sound-proof is a bit inconvenient.
reviews.response:
Dear Ms. Hong,

Thank you very much for your kind feedback. We’re pleased to hear that you had a good experience during your stay with us.

We also appreciate your comment regarding the soundproofing. Your input is very important to us, and we will certainly take it into consideration as we continue to improve our facilities and guest comfort.

Should you have any further suggestions or if there’s anything we can do to enhance your future visits, please do not hesitate to let us know. We look forward to welcoming you back soon.

Warm regards,
Lieu Ngo
Hotel Operations Manager

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Un hotel-hostel de lujo para jóvenes y estudiantes locales. Equipado con la última tecnología y respetando consumo energético. El restaurante no tiene apenas variedad y lo que tiene es comida rápida occidental. Estética industrial.
Habitaciones muy bien, aunque no muy grandes, pero montadas muy inteligentemente con todo lo que pudieras necesitar. Muy moderno. Ventanales en las habitaciones impresionantes
reviews.negatives: Restaurante muy limitado y comida occidental. Ambiente de hostel estudiantil de Europa, pero es hotel. No es mala crítica, simo descrpción Tampoco en la mejor parte de la ciudad, pero en todo caso todo está cerca en grab/taxi.

reviews.title: Generally good
reviews.text: Staff were not super professional, although they are very helpful and friendly. Location is a bit off from all the prime sights in Can Tho.

reviews.title: Bon rapport qualité prix .. personnel réceptif aux embarras et essaie de trouver la solution
reviews.positives: La propreté et le confort pour un prix honnête
reviews.negatives: Certaines chambres avaient un problème électrique… prise électrique et air conditionné

reviews.title: Quite good experience
reviews.text: The wall are to thin even when my room was on the end of the aisle but still can hear people talking from the elevator coming out, minimal choice for breakfast and most day be the same thing staff is nice and room is clean.

reviews.title: Excellent

reviews.title: Hotel in the city center, with amenities.
reviews.text: The hotel is located in a central area of the city, making it convenient for travel. The lobby and breakfast buffet area are decorated in bright, cheerful colors and a modern style. The breakfast buffet is reasonably adequate but not very diverse. The rooms are clean and tidy, equipped with enough amenities in a compact and sensible layout.

reviews.title: Nicht empfehlenswert
reviews.positives: Die Aussicht vom Zimmer
reviews.negatives:
- Das Zimmer ist zu klein
- Die Lage ist nicht ideal und weit weg vom Zentrum
- Am Abend war alles dunkel auf der Strasse, kein Restaurant oder Stand offen
- Die Lichter und der Fernseh schalteten sich immer automatisch ein, als wir schliefen.

reviews.title: Neatly trimmed and just enough to use.
reviews.text: Modern, convenient, fully equipped at a basic level, a place to sleep - not for enjoyment.

reviews.title: Bemühter Manager, aber einige Schwächen
reviews.positives: Das Konzept ist gut, aber
reviews.negatives:
Wir haben 3 Nächte im True by Hilton Can Tho verbracht. Der Start war etwas holprig, da die Klimaanlage im ersten Zimmer defekt war (bei ca. 31 Grad). Nach kurzer Diskussion hat der Manager sehr engagiert reagiert und uns unkompliziert ein anderes Zimmer angeboten – das möchten wir positiv hervorheben.

In der ersten Nacht im zweiten Zimmer war die Klimaanlage/Steuerung leider sehr laut, sodass Schlafen nur eingeschränkt möglich war. Außerdem funktionierte die „Do Not Disturb“-Anzeige nicht, was nicht unangenehm war. 
Das Frühstück war eher schlicht, und auch bei der Sauberkeit im Flurbereich (8. Stock) hatten wir den Eindruck, dass nicht gereinigt wurde. Die Zimmer wirken insgesamt etwas renovierungsbedürftig (u. a. im Bad - Duschtasse angeschlagen und an den Rändern Schimmelbildung. Insgesamt wirkte der gesamte Duschbereich ungepflegt. 

Die Lage war relativ weit außerhalb, für kleine Einkäufe (z. B. Getränke) muss man ca. 500 m laufen. Englisch ist teilweise an der Rezeption schwierig, Bei einem doch internationalen Publikum verbesserungsbedürftig. 

Fazit: Freundliches Team und ein sehr engagierter Manager, aber für uns gibt es in Can Tho wahrscheinlich bessere Optionen – wir würden beim nächsten Mal eher zentraler wohnen. Zudem sollte man nicht davon ausgehen, dass alle Tru by Hilton Hotels gleich sind.

reviews.title: Very nice hotel!
reviews.text: The room is clean, the staff is very kind and helpful. The prices are very reasonable.

reviews.title: Great experience
reviews.text: The King room has large windows with a beautiful view, the hotel has a bar, breakfast buffet, and a gym.
reviews.response:
Dear Thanh,
We are truly heartened to receive your generous review of Tru By Hilton Can Tho Cai Khe. Thank you for letting us know how much you enjoyed it, we are especially pleased that you felt well-looked after. We look forward to having you with us again in the near future.
Kind Regards,
Vo Thi Phuong Thao
Guest Operations Manager

reviews.title: Excellent Stay with Great Value
reviews.text:
I had a very pleasant stay at Tru by Hilton, Can Tho.Initially booked for one night but was so satisfied that I extended my stay for an additional two nights.

The hotel truly reflects Hilton’s budget quality standards. The rooms are clean, comfortable, and well maintained, with updated facilities and a nice view. The shower experience was very good, and the in room amenities were thoughtfully provided.

What stood out most was the staff. The team is young, energetic, and very professional, offering excellent service throughout my stay.

Highly recommend this hotel for anyone visiting Can Tho

reviews.title: The best hotel
reviews.text: The bus from Ho Chi Minh City arrived too early, which was a problem, but the hotel staff allowed me to rest in the lobby, which helped me recover and spend the day in good health. The room I stayed in was comfortable and had a sofa bed.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you very much for sharing your experience with us.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused by the early arrival of your bus from Ho Chi Minh City. However, we are pleased to know that our staff was able to assist you by offering a place to rest in the lobby, allowing you to recover and enjoy your day in good health.
Thia Nguyen
Tru by Hilton Can Tho Cai Khe

reviews.title: Nice choice!
reviews.text: Best value for money
reviews.response:
Dear Mr. Hieu,

Thank you for choosing our hotel and for sharing your kind feedback. We’re delighted to hear that you found us to be a nice choice and appreciated the value we offer.

Providing excellent service at a great price is one of our top priorities, and it’s wonderful to know that this was reflected in your experience. We truly appreciate your support and look forward to welcoming you again soon.

Warm regards,
Lieu Ngo
Hotel Operations Manager

reviews.negatives: Only one switch next to the bed to operate all the lights even in the toilet, small room, not much to choose from for breakfast, no hooks to hang towels also they need to think about some drawers or small closet for clothes, TV not working, Volume not working at all, it looks like this is smart tv but YT Netflix and any other not working as well, we have been told they do system update

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Small room in comparison to others we've stayed in, but by far the most comfortable bed we've stayed in during our 3 months of travelling.  Very clean.
Staff extremely friendly and helpful, breakfast was very good. Although the menu was small the food was excellent and freshly cooked.
We also took the opportunity to do our laundry using the self service washing machines.which were great and easy to use and there was a full size iron and ironing board.
reviews.negatives: The room style may not be to everyone's taste, it's very modern with a pod style bathroom.
